verdict.answer_first: B gets to an execution plan faster with "Phase 0 — Decide the alert destination (30 min)"; A opens with "recall lookup and the clarifying questions got blocked," which delays the actionable answer.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more clearly to one direction with "Managed SaaS first, free tiers, expand later"; B uses more alternatives like "Better Stack / UptimeRobot" and "Better Stack Logs or CloudWatch Logs."
verdict.fabrication: both invent details; A: "prod 사주/천기문 web app"; B: "saju/premium-v2 flow" and "Next.js-ish web app, Aurora PostgreSQL + Supabase".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on now because it gives ordered work with timing and concrete targets: "Phase 0 — Decide the alert destination (30 min)", "Phase 1 — Stop flying blind (Week 1)", and specific checks like "homepage, login... payment callback".
